questions.question:
What is the access point \( \text{(AP)} \) in a wireless \( \text{LAN} \; ? \)



Computer Networks: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B
options: device that allows wireless devices to connect to a wired network
both device that allows wireless devices to connect to a wired network and wireless devices itself
questions.correct_answer: device that allows wireless devices to connect to a wired network
